ddls:
CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "emails" TEXT /* Email addresses of the developer (comma-separated if multiple) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the developer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the developer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the developer account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the developer's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developer_projects" (
  "dev_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer-project association */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the developer joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the developer left the project (if applicable) */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_projects_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the commit belongs to */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "num_lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "num_lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed in the commit */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file associated with the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch the commit belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "owner_dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who owns the file */,
  "dmm_complexity" REAL /* DMM complexity score of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., java, python, c++) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_owner_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developer_metrics" (
  "dev_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer metric record */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "10x_label_churn" INTEGER /* 10x label churn (for benchmarking) */,
  "10x_label_commits" INTEGER /* 10x label commits (for benchmarking) */,
  "churn" INTEGER /* Total lines of code added and removed (churn) */,
  "num_commits" INTEGER /* Total number of commits */,
  "first_commit" TEXT /* Date and time of the first commit */,
  "last_commit" TEXT /* Date and time of the last commit */,
  "churn_productivity" REAL /* Churn productivity (churn / num_commits) */,
  "commit_productivity" REAL /* Commit productivity (num_commits / time) */,
  "num_owned_files" INTEGER /* Number of files owned by the developer */,
  "sum_of_dmm_complexities" REAL /* Sum of DMM complexities for files owned by the developer */,
  "commits_with_dmm_complexity_present" INTEGER /* Number of commits with DMM complexity present */,
  "num_comments_added_removed" INTEGER /* Number of comments added or removed */,
  "average_code_complexity" REAL /* Average code complexity of the developer's commits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_metrics_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the comment is associated with */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the comment */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., added, removed) */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the comment */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view_project) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dev_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_id") REFERENCES developers ("dev_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "project_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project metric record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "avg_churn" REAL /* Average churn of the project */,
  "avg_num_commits" REAL /* Average number of commits in the project */,
  "avg_commit_productivity" REAL /* Average commit productivity of the project */,
  "total_code_complexity" REAL /* Total code complexity of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_types" (
  "commit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit type */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of the commit (e.g., feature, bugfix, refactor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_types_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)
